message:
feat(transcript): add plan revision tracking and narrative context

Enhances the "How It Was Made" transcript experience with richer
context about planning decisions and iterative improvements.

AnnotatedGuide Component:
- Add narrative prose block for each build section
- Display plan revision links as styled chips
- Link to planning revisions panel (GPT Pro feedback)
- Visual hierarchy: narrative -> revisions -> outcomes -> artifacts
- Styled with violet/emerald accents for visual distinction

MultiModelFeedback Component:
- Add GPT Pro planning revisions section
- Track architectural decisions (shared core, BM25, CAC parser)
- Track quality improvements (skill manifest, YAML safety, health)
- Track feature additions (prompt templating)
- Implementation status badges (implemented/planned)
- Add anchor IDs for deep linking from guide steps

Annotations Data:
- Add narrative text to each guide step
- Add planPanel flag for steps with GPT Pro review
- Add revisions array linking to specific changes
- Connect guide sections to feedback panel items
- Maintain data structure compatibility

This creates a cohesive story of the build process, showing not just
what was built but also how AI feedback shaped the architecture.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
